heading: Inventory of real property
label: 5105 Inventory of real property
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 679 of this titleSubsec. L. 115–232, § 3539(2)“(1) maintain the inventory required under subsection (a) on an ongoing basis; and“(2) update information on each unit of real property included in such inventory not later than 30 days after any change relating to the control of such property.”

children.text: the size, the location, and any other appropriate description of each unit of such property;
an assessment of the physical condition of each unit of such property, excluding lands;

children.label: A
children.text: retained to fulfill a current or projected Coast Guard mission requirement; or
other information the Commandant considers appropriate.

children.heading: .—Updates
children.label: b .—Updates
children.text: The Commandant shall update information on each unit of real property included in the inventory required under subsection (a) not later than 30 days after any change relating to the control of such property.
a list of all real property under the control of the Coast Guard and the location of such property by property type;
recommendations for divestiture with respect to any units of such property; and

children.label: A
children.text: an estimate of the costs or savings associated with each recommended consolidation; and

children.label: B
children.text: a discussion of the impact that such consolidation would have on Coast Guard mission effectiveness.
